title: Trisepalum strobilaceum
taxonomy: Trisepalum strobilaceum belongs to the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as African violet or gesneriad family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which includes other flowering plants like mint, lavender, and honeysuckle. Trisepalum strobilaceum is a genus of flowering plants, specifically a species of gesneriad. The genus Trisepalum is part of the subfamily Didymocarpoideae. It is native to Australia.
